home.description: We combine the quality of technical education with firmly established Islamic values to build a generation that reads and understands the Quran, in an intelligent and interactive educational environment.

programs.title: Our Educational Programs
programs.description: Our programs are carefully designed to suit all levels with a modern, interactive approach that combines deep understanding and practical application.

integrated.title: Integrated Program
integrated.description: A comprehensive program combining Quran and Arabic language education in an integrated path to build a generation proud of its Islamic identity.

arabic.title: Arabic Language Program
arabic.description: Learn Arabic from scratch in an easy, simplified way with direct practical applications.

quran.title: Quran Memorization Program
quran.description: A gradual memorization methodology focusing on pronunciation and Tajweed rules, with personalized plans for each student.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Manarat Al-Ezz Academy. All rights reserved.
footer.description: A leading academy in the field of Quranic and educational distance learning. We strive to spread the light of revelation in every home through modern technologies and global educational standards.

about.title: A modern public learning website
about.description: We help education teams connect, publish courses, and support learners in Arabic and English.
about.missionText: Deliver simple, secure learning tools for every role in the school ecosystem.
about.visionText: Enable accessible digital learning that works across devices and languages.
about.valuesText: Clear communication, reliable access, and scalable user experiences.
about.teamText: Our platform is designed for administrators, teachers, and students who need a polished, responsive interface.

courses.ctaText: Our platform makes it easy to share structured learning experiences for every role.

premiumParents.title: Why do parents choose us?

tracking.description: A comprehensive dashboard for parents providing a complete view of the student's level and progress in memorization and lessons moment by moment.

certified.title: Certified Teachers
certified.description: An elite of distinguished teachers holding high ijazahs in Quran and qualified certificates in education and teaching.

live.title: Live Sessions

start.title: Start your live session
start.description: Embark on your learning journey through our advanced virtual classrooms, direct interaction, motivating environment, and tangible results.

testimonials.title: Parents' Reviews
testimonials.subtitle: Success stories from the Manarat Al-Ezz family

items.name: Khaled Al-Rashid
items.text: The technical quality is very high, we faced no connection issues, and the teachers are very patient and explain with a modern and innovative teaching style.

items.name: Umm Layan
items.text: The system and precise tracking impressed me the most, I can follow my daughter in every session directly through my phone, excellent experience.

items.name: Abu Saif
items.text: I didn't expect my daughter to love Quran lessons this much, the teachers have a wonderful educational style that makes the child love memorization and learning.

teachers.title: Elite of Our Teachers
teachers.description: We take pride in our qualified and distinguished educational staff
teachers.heroDescription: We present to you a selection of qualified and certified teachers in the Ten Qira'at and Tajweed, ensuring distinguished Islamic education for your children

curriculums.subtitle: Our Learning Pathways
curriculums.title: Featured Learning Curriculums
curriculums.ctaText: Ready to explore our curriculums? Join us today!

items.title: Arabic Language
items.description: Master Arabic grammar, literature, and writing skills.

items.title: English Language
items.description: Comprehensive English course covering grammar, communication, and literature.

items.title: Mathematics
items.description: Build strong foundational and advanced mathematical concepts.

items.title: Science
items.description: Explore physics, chemistry, and biology fundamentals.

items.title: Social Studies
items.description: Learn about history, geography, and cultural awareness.

items.title: Information Technology
items.description: Introduction to computer science and digital literacy.

f1.title: Empowering learners
f1.desc: Our goal is not merely indoctrination, but empowering every learner with the tools that help them understand the meanings of the Quran and appreciate its beauty, to become capable of expressing this great language and spreading its message across the world. We strive to instill a love of learning and contemplation so the Quran becomes a guiding light in their daily lives.

f2.title: Modern technology
f2.desc: We use the latest remote education technologies to make lessons interactive and enjoyable, suitable for today's tech-savvy generation.

f3.title: Safe environment
f3.desc: We provide a safe digital haven for your children, where teachers are selected through rigorous tests to ensure their scientific competence and educational integrity.

f4.title: Academic excellence
f4.desc: Our academy relies on curriculums carefully selected by senior scholars and educators, ensuring a precise balance between memorization and understanding, and between grammar and practical application, creating a comprehensive educational environment.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: Providing outstanding Quranic and Arabic education accessible to everyone everywhere, we believe that knowledge is a shared right, and that the beauty of our language and religion must reach every heart clearly and easily.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: Empowering Muslims worldwide to learn their language and religion through modern educational technologies and specialized teachers, while preserving Islamic values and role models.

v1.title: Scientific Integrity
v1.desc: Transmitting knowledge with an uninterrupted chain and a solid methodology that preserves authenticity.

v2.title: Gentleness and Softness
v2.desc: Education with love and encouragement according to the honorable prophetic methodology.

v3.title: Facilitation and Inclusivity
v3.desc: Making knowledge accessible to everyone regardless of distances and circumstances.

hero.title2: meets the purity of the soul
hero.subtitle: Manarat Al-Ezz is not just an academy, it is a journey into the depths of knowledge, designed to be a digital haven combining the authenticity of heritage and the modernity of technology.

banner.title: Contact us to register and subscribe
banner.desc: Give your children the opportunity to learn and grow through our educational courses designed to develop skills and build confidence in a fun and safe way.
